[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0001000001 2
3 1110100011 6
4 1001000010 3
5 0111000000 3
6 1000000001 2
7 1001000010 3

01 10 1000100111 5
12 21 1100110110 6
23 32 0101010000 3
34 43 0111000001 4
45 54 1011000010 4
56 65 1011000000 3
67 76 1000000100 2
70 07 1000000101 3

02 20 1001100110 5
13 31 0110010001 4
24 42 1101100010 5
35 53 0011000000 2
46 64 1111100000 5
57 75 1000000000 1
60 06 1001100100 4
71 17 1000010101 4

03 30 0001000001 2 match 2
14 41 1110100011 6 match 3
25 52 1001000010 3 match 4 7
36 63 0111000000 3 match 5
47 74 1000000001 2 match 6
50 05 1001000010 3 match 4 7
61 16 1110100100 5
72 27 1000010100 3

04 40 1001100011 5
15 51 1010000010 3
26 62 1101100100 5
37 73 0000010001 2
